title: One Forward Beats Two: InnerZoom for Accurate and Efficient GUI Grounding
innovation_summary: One Forward Beats Two: InnerZoom for Accurate and Efficient GUI Grounding: To retain the accuracy benefits of two-pass zooming without this extra cost, we propose InnerZoom, a single-forward framework for cross-layer evidence bridging.
